Tutorial Index#

Comprehensive tutorials for all 57 CoreRec models with cr_learn examples.

Getting Started#

Before diving into specific models, we recommend:

  1. Read the Installation Guide

  2. Follow the QuickStart

  3. Understand Core Concepts

Core Engine Models#

These 6 models are production-ready and cover most use cases:

  • DCN Tutorial: Deep & Cross Network
  • DeepFM Tutorial: Factorization Machine with Deep Learning
  • GNNRec Tutorial: Graph Neural Network Recommender
  • MIND Tutorial: MIND
  • NASRec Tutorial: NASRec
  • SASRec Tutorial: SASRec

Neural Network Models (29)#

Deep learning models for complex pattern recognition:

  • AFM Tutorial: Attentional Factorization Machine
  • AutoFI Tutorial: Automatic Feature Interaction
  • AutoInt Tutorial: Automatic Feature Interaction Learning via Self-Attention
  • Bert4Rec Tutorial: BERT for Sequential Recommendation
  • BST Tutorial: Behavior Sequence Transformer
  • BiVAE Tutorial: Bilateral Variational Autoencoder
  • Caser Tutorial: Convolutional Sequence Embedding Recommendation
  • DCN_base Tutorial: Deep & Cross Network Base
  • DeepCrossing Tutorial: Deep Crossing Network
  • DeepFM_base Tutorial: DeepFM Base
  • DeepRec Tutorial: Deep Recommender
  • DIEN Tutorial: Deep Interest Evolution Network
  • DIFM Tutorial: Dual Input Factorization Machine
  • DIN Tutorial: Deep Interest Network
  • DLRM Tutorial: Deep Learning Recommendation Model
  • ENSFM Tutorial: Ensemble Factorization Machine
  • ESCMM Tutorial: Entire Space Cross Multi-Task Model
  • ESMM Tutorial: Entire Space Multi-Task Model
  • FGCNN Tutorial: Feature Generation with CNN
  • FFM Tutorial: Field-aware Factorization Machine
  • Fibinet Tutorial: Feature Importance and Bilinear feature Interaction
  • FLEN Tutorial: Feature-aware Local Encoding Network
  • FM Tutorial: Factorization Machine
  • GAN Tutorial: Generative Adversarial Network
  • GateNet Tutorial: Gating Network
  • GNN_base Tutorial: Graph Neural Network Base
  • GRU-CF Tutorial: GRU for Collaborative Filtering
  • NCF Tutorial: Neural Collaborative Filtering
  • NFM Tutorial: Neural Factorization Machine
  • NextItNet Tutorial: Next Item Net
  • WideDeep Tutorial: Wide & Deep Learning
  • YouTubeDNN Tutorial: YouTube Deep Neural Network
  • PNN Tutorial: Product-based Neural Network
  • MMoE Tutorial: Multi-gate Mixture-of-Experts
  • PLE Tutorial: Progressive Layered Extraction
  • Monolith Tutorial: Monolith: Real Time Recommendation System
  • TDM Tutorial: Tree-based Deep Model

Matrix Factorization Models (9)#

Classic collaborative filtering approaches:

  • A2SVD Tutorial: Adaptive Singular Value Decomposition
  • ALS Tutorial: Alternating Least Squares
  • FM_Base Tutorial: Factorization Machine Base
  • MatrixFactorization Tutorial: Matrix Factorization
  • MF_Base Tutorial: MF Base
  • SVD Tutorial: Singular Value Decomposition
  • UserBased Tutorial: User-Based Collaborative Filtering

Graph-Based Models (6)#

Models leveraging graph structure:

  • GeoIMC Tutorial: Geographic Inductive Matrix Completion
  • LightGCN Tutorial: Light Graph Convolutional Network
  • LightGCN_Base Tutorial: LightGCN Base

Sequential Models (6)#

Time-aware recommendation models:

  • RBM Tutorial: Restricted Boltzmann Machine
  • RLRMC Tutorial: Reinforcement Learning for Recommendation
  • SAR Tutorial: Smart Adaptive Recommendations
  • SLiRec Tutorial: Sequential List Recommendation
  • SUM Tutorial: Sequential User Model

Bayesian Models (3)#

Probabilistic approaches:

  • BPR Tutorial: Bayesian Personalized Ranking
  • BPRMF Tutorial: Bayesian Personalized Ranking Matrix Factorization
  • VMF Tutorial: Von Mises-Fisher Distribution

Content-Based Models (3)#

Feature-based recommendations:

  • MIND_Content Tutorial: MIND for Content Filtering
  • TFIDF Tutorial: TF-IDF Based Recommender

Pipeline & System Tutorials#

End-to-end system tutorials:

  • Multi-Stage Pipeline Tutorial
  • Demo Frontends Tutorial

Tutorial Structure#

Each tutorial follows a consistent structure:

  1. Introduction - What the model does

  2. How It Works - Architecture and math

  3. Step-by-Step Tutorial - Complete example with cr_learn

  4. Advanced Usage - Customization and tuning

  5. Key Takeaways - When to use, best practices

  6. Further Reading - Papers and references

Learning Path#

Beginners#

  1. Start with DCN Tutorial

  2. Try Matrix Factorization

  3. Explore Sequential Models

Intermediate#

  1. Deep dive into DeepFM

  2. Learn Graph Methods

  3. Master Multi-Interest

Advanced#

  1. Study Neural Architecture Search

  2. Implement Custom Models

  3. Deploy to Production
